description_long: A muscular adult male is depicted wearing a sleeveless tank top, fitted cargo pants, and sturdy combat boots. He sports a beret on his head and fingerless gloves on his hands, giving him a rugged, military-inspired appearance. A bandolier with visible ammunition is slung diagonally across his torso, and a utility belt is fastened at his waist. His arms are exposed, revealing tattoos and a strong build, while his facial expression is alert and focused. The overall look suggests readiness for action, with practical clothing and accessories suited for urban or tactical environments.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless tank top, cargo pants, combat boots, and a beret, equipped with a bandolier and utility belt, exuding a military-inspired, action-ready appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beret, bandolier, sleeveless tank top, and alert facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bandolier, arm tattoo, and utility belt details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the beret, bandolier, exposed arms, and cargo pants.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the muscular build, gloves, and side profile of the face.
attribute_clothing_type: military-inspired sleeveless tank top, cargo pants, utility belt, fingerless gloves, beret, and combat boots
